Talia Foster

16

Royalton CHIC Cancun, An Autograph Collection All-Inclusive Resort - Adults Only Reviews, Deals & Photos 2024 - Expedia

The Royalton Chic Cancun was a good choice. It’s an adult only all inclusive resort. *Customer service 10/10 *Location 10/10. We were close to restaurants and night life if we wanted to go off the resort. A few things were in walking distance *Food 5/10. The selection was good but it didn’t taste that good. ( I'm not a foodie so make your own assessment) *Activities 8/10 they had a variety of things to do *Pools and beach 10/10 *Room 10/10 we had an ocean view room, daily cleaning from housekeeping, waffle robes, balcony with a beautiful view, safe, and fridge that they’ll restock for you at any time. I'd book this hotel again.

Xplor Fuego Nighttime Adventure + Transport *Official ...

We did the explore park at night and had a blast. There were 9 zip lines and it was a beautiful view to do at night time. We work our swim suits and shorts to participate in the activites because you do get wet and we didn't want our behind exposed on the zip lines, rafts and buggies.

Fiesta Americana Condesa Cancun All Inclusive

All inclusive resort

Now Foods 100% pure magnesium flakes 54 Ounce, 1.53 ...

If it says 100% pure magnesium chloride - it's a YES FROM ME - use this in your bath after an intense day to relax or create magnesium oil by mixing 1:1 radio flakes to distilled water and spray daily on armpits, tummy and feet (at night) to get your daily magnesium intake &lt;3.This is the more affordable option but still 100% pure magnesium flakes, for your bath/foot soak or to create magnesium oil&nbsp;

18

Bathroom Safety

When I start taking care of My Mom this was a huge worry until we found the safety equipment to make her feel comfortable

The Best Indoor Security Cameras for 2023

Indoor Cameras are a big help to keep an eye on a loved one with Dementia or any other health problems

Door Alarms For Home

Door Alarms are incredible when you have a Loved one that wanders. I have one on front door, back door and her bed room and i keep the alarm in my bedroom so i know if she is wandering while I sleep

See all 18 recs

View List
Homecare for Elderly

As A Caregiver to my Mom, this list is some of the things I &nbsp;have learned that help me get through everyday. She has dementia and has live with with for over 2 years. Elder safety is something I learned as time went by. The Security Cameras not only give me the ability to keep an eye on her while doing chores around the house but also give me the &nbsp;ability to escape to a private space and take a breath without having to worry as much about her. The door alarms would be my second favorite item I use. Most of the time she is just going out to sit on the porch but once in awhile she tries to wander farther away. when I hear the door alarm if I can't ran right to the door I can quickly check the cameras and see that she's Ok. I hope you find this list helpful and I will keep adding to it.

jessica merjaneh

57

When Breath Becomes Air by Paul Kalanithi

It's a powerful memoir written by a neurosurgeon named Paul, who was diagnosed with terminal lung cancer at a young age. In this heartfelt and thought-provoking account, he takes us on a journey from being a healer of patients to becoming a patient himself. Through his eloquent writing, Paul reflects on the meaning of life, mortality, and the pursuit of purpose amidst facing death. This was one of the most captivating books I have ever read after I picked it up I could not put it down.

The Song of Achilles by Madeline Miller

This novel retells the Greek myth of Achilles and the Trojan War. Through the eyes of Patroclus, a young prince who becomes Achilles' closest companion and lover, the story unfolds with heart-wrenching emotion and rich storytelling. This book made me sob.

In Five Years: A Novel by Rebecca Serle

6 star read. Literally one of my favorite books ever written.The story follows Dannie Kohan, a meticulous planner, who has her life all figured out. But one night, after falling asleep, she wakes up in an entirely different life, five years into the future, with a different man by her side.

33

Personalized Message in a Bottle

Enjoy a big love with a tiny token of affection and celebration in the form of this personalized photo message in a bottle. The handmade trinket is barely larger than 2" in size, but it includes a sentimental message hung from the cork, the couple's photo, and a sprinkling of pretty silver stars.

First Christmas Engaged Ornament

With this adorable Our First Engaged Christmas Ornament, jingle bells and wedding bells ring in perfect harmony. The handcrafted ornament is made of maple or cherry wood and is thick and sturdy enough to last a lifetime.

Gel Nail Kit

Pre-wedding manis can completely deplete a bride's wedding budget, but with this set, she can give herself a gel manicure at home. The UV cured, several colors of nail polish, and the tools she'll need to make her nails look great are all included in the kit.

Products in my bathroom cabinet

I have rosecea so trying to &nbsp;find something that WORKS has been tough. &nbsp;I've used everything from soolantra to doxycycline. &nbsp;Finally found something topical that WORKS. &nbsp;Now I do have a 15% strength of azelaic acid which is RX but 10% should do just fine. &nbsp;Everything else is stuff I just use on a daily.

Hayar

13

nhow Amsterdam Rai

This wonderful stay is right next to the RAI Convention Centre. That means you're in the middle of all the action. Plus, the tram stop is a hop, skip, and jump away, so exploring the city is a breeze.<br> <br> The rooms are not your regular snooze-fests, that's for sure. Each room has its own unique style and vibe. You'll feel like you're stepping into a modern art gallery or a fashion mag. And don't worry, the beds are super comfy too! <br> nhow Amsterdam RAI has a bunch of restaurants that'll make your taste buds dance. From morning munchies to late-night bites, they've got you covered. Oh, and the views from the rooftop bar? Totally Instagram-worthy! <br> Vacation is all about relaxing, right? Well, nhow Amsterdam RAI totally gets it. They've got chill-out zones where you can kick back, soak up the sun, and enjoy a good book. And if you're feeling fancy, you can even rent a bike and explore the city like a true local. <br> The hotel staff are like your buddies away from home, always ready to help you out. Need tips on where to grab the best stroopwafels? They've got your back. <br> While nhow Amsterdam RAI is super rad, don't forget to venture out and explore the city. You're close to hotspots like the Heineken Experience and the Van Gogh Museum. And the best part? You can come back to your comfy pad at nhow after a day of city adventures. <br> nhow Amsterdam RAI is the ultimate spot to crash while you're taking on the city of canals and bicycles. With its top-notch location, stylish digs, and laid-back vibes, you're in for an epic Amsterdam experience. Whether you're a culture buff, a food fanatic, or just want to soak in the good vibes, nhow Amsterdam RAI is where it's happening.

Motel One Amsterdam-Waterlooplein

This chic gem is your ticket to an epic city adventure. <br> Step into sleek comfort as you enter the stylish rooms, each inviting you to unwind after a day of city exploration. The friendly vibe and modern design will make you feel right at ease. Motel One Amsterdam-Waterlooplein offers a tasty array of dining options that will satisfy your cravings and leave you wanting more.<br> Plus, you're just a stone's throw away from hotspots like Waterlooplein Market and Rembrandt House Museum. Whether you're here for business or leisure, Motel One Amsterdam-Waterlooplein is your urban retreat. Get ready for an unforgettable Amsterdam journey filled with comfort and style.

Indoor Inn

This hidden treasure is your gateway to an unforgettable Amsterdam escapade. <br> Step into a realm of relaxation as you enter the inviting rooms, each offering a cozy haven after a day of exploration. The warm and welcoming atmosphere will make you feel like a cherished guest. Outside Inn Amsterdam presents a delectable array of dining options that will tantalize your taste buds and leave you wanting more. You're perfectly positioned to discover iconic spots like Vondelpark and the vibrant Leidseplein. Whether you're here for leisure or business, Outside Inn Amsterdam is your home away from home. Get ready to craft lasting memories in the heart of Amsterdam's charm.

See all 13 recs
